description_long: This is a small, vibrantly colored bird with a striking blue cap and nape, a white face bordered by a black eye stripe, and a yellow-green underbelly. Its wings and tail are predominantly blue with subtle white markings, while the back transitions from green to blue. The bird has a short, conical black beak and slender gray legs with sharp claws. The plumage features a mix of solid and gradient color transitions, especially noticeable on the wings and head. The overall appearance is lifelike and detailed, capturing the essence of a Eurasian Blue Tit.
description: A small, vividly colored bird with a blue cap, white face, yellow-green belly, and blue wings and tail. It has a short black beak and slender gray legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue cap, white face, black eye stripe, and yellow-green chest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the blue wing, green back, and the bird's short black beak.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the blue and green gradient on the back and the full length of the blue tail.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the blue wing, green back, and facial markings.
attribute_plumage_pattern: blue cap and wings, white face with black eye stripe, yellow-green underparts, greenish back, subtle white wing markings
